zh.lifeSummary: Matilda Hereford於大約1273年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾利哈達斯 卡素。她於大約1289年與Hugh de Mortimer在英國賀福爾理查茲 卡素結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。她去世於1308年2月16日在英國享年36歲。

nameMeanings.name: Hereford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Hertford (Hertfordshire) (in which the t was lost early, as in the modern pronunciation Harford), Hereford (Herefordshire), or Harford (Devon, Gloucestershire). The Devon and Herefordshire placenames derive from Old English here ‘army’ + ford ‘ford’, while the Gloucestershire and Hertfordshire placenames derive from Old English heorot ‘hart, stag’ + ford.

variants.name: Herford
meanings: German: habitational name from a place of that name in Westphalia.

variants.name: Harford
meanings: English (Wiltshire and Gloucestershire): variant of   Hereford  .

variants.name: Havard
meanings: English and Welsh (Brecknockshire and Glamorgan): habitational name from Haverfordwest (Pembrokeshire), from Old English hæfer ‘goat’ + ford ‘ford’.
English and Welsh (Brecknockshire and Glamorgan): in some cases, the name may also be a variant of   Hereford  .
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Hahward, composed of the elements hah, which is unexplained, and ward ‘guard’.

variants.name: Hurford
meanings: English (Devon and Somerset): variant of   Hereford  .

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: Matilda Hereford was born about 1273, in Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Hugh de Mortimer about 1289, in Richards Castle, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. She died on 16 February 1308, in England, at the age of 36.

Elle a épousé Hugh de Mortimer environ 1289, à Richards Castle, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 février 1308, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 36 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda Herefordは約1273年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアリチャード'ス カストルで生まれた。約1289年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアリチャーズ カストルでHugh de Mortimerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1308年2月16日にイギリスで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda Hereford(은)는 대략 1273년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 리처드'스 카스틀에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1289년 영국 허퍼드실르 리처스 카스틀에서 Hugh de Mortimer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1308년 2월 16일 영국에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Matilda Hereford родилась около 1273 г. в местности ричард'с кастл, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh de Mortimer около 1289 г. в местности ричардс кастл, хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Она умерла 16 февраля 1308 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 36 лет.
